title: Echinopsis huotii
taxonomy: Echinopsis huotii is classified as a species of cactus within the genus Echinopsis. It belongs to the family Cactaceae, which is a large and diverse group of succulent plants. Echinopsis huotii is further classified as a member of the subfamily Cactoideae and the tribe Echinopseae. Within the genus Echinopsis, it is a distinct species characterized by its unique morphology and distribution. Further classification may include specific ranks such as species group, series, or section, but these are not universally agreed upon.
